ion_action.objective:
B01_B04_EXTENSION_QUEUE_PROTOCOL_CONTEXT_PACKAGE_001.

Goal:
Create the first protocol/schema/template context package for ION extension queues, chat self-queue, selected request start, dynamic editable queue packets, agent queue visibility, queue settlement, and agent/capsule/protocol classification in the extension cockpit.

Product frame:
The extension must distinguish and visualize:
- Codex work queue
- browser/self-chat queue
- carrier-message queue
- action/approval receipts
- agent invocation queue
- branch carrier messages
- capsule/context-bound agents
- full ION orchestration agents
- Codex CLI implementation workers
- local ops / daemon workers

Core problem:
The current extension Agent panel exposes generic controls like Start One, but that starts the queue head and may not start the selected/latest/approved action.
ION needs explicit queue taxonomy, selected-request start, editable candidate queue packets, queue visibility views, and mode memory.

Required context reads:
- ION/04_packages/kernel/ion_codex_queue_runner.py
- ION/04_packages/kernel/ion_chatgpt_browser_mcp_connector_contract.py
- ION/04_packages/kernel/ion_custom_gpt_action_gateway.py
- ION/04_packages/kernel/ion_chatops_bridge.py
- ION/05_context/current/action_gateway/runtime/browser_queue.json
- ION/05_context/current/ACTIVE_CHATGPT_CONNECTOR_CODEX_WORK_QUEUE.json
- ION/05_context/current/ACTIVE_CARRIER_MESSAGE_QUEUE.json
- ION/09_integrations/browser_extension/ion_chatops_bridge/README.md
- ION/09_integrations/browser_extension/ion_chatops_bridge/src/schema.ts
- ION/09_integrations/browser_extension/ion_chatops_bridge/src/background.ts
- ION/09_integrations/browser_extension/ion_chatops_bridge/src/content.ts
- ION/09_integrations/browser_extension/ion_chatops_bridge/src/approval_ui.ts

If exact extension paths differ, locate the current browser extension source under ION/09_integrations or equivalent current repo path and report the path evidence.

Required outputs:
Create or propose a context package under an appropriate current path such as:
ION/05_context/current/extension_queue_protocol_context_package/ION_EXTENSION_QUEUE_PROTOCOL_CONTEXT_PACKAGE_v0_1/

Include:
- MANIFEST.json
- README.md

PROTOCOLS:
- EXTENSION_QUEUE_REGISTRY_PROTOCOL.md
- EXTENSION_QUEUE_PACKET_LIFECYCLE_PROTOCOL.md
- AGENT_EDITABLE_QUEUE_PACKET_PROTOCOL.md
- QUEUE_VISIBILITY_AND_REDACTION_PROTOCOL.md
- SELECTED_REQUEST_START_PROTOCOL.md
- CHAT_SELF_QUEUE_PROTOCOL.md
- BRANCH_CARRIER_MESSAGE_QUEUE_PROTOCOL.md
- RESULT_CAPTURE_AND_RETURN_PROTOCOL.md
- QUEUE_EVENT_LEDGER_PROTOCOL.md
- QUEUE_SETTLEMENT_PROTOCOL.md

SCHEMAS:
- extension_queue_packet.schema.json
- queue_event.schema.json
- queue_registry.schema.json
- queue_visibility_view.schema.json
- selected_request_start.schema.json
- browser_self_queue_packet.schema.json
- agent_classification.schema.json
- queue_result_capture.schema.json

TEMPLATES:
- CREATE_QUEUE_PACKET_TEMPLATE.md
- EDIT_QUEUE_PACKET_TEMPLATE.md
- APPROVE_QUEUE_PACKET_TEMPLATE.md
- START_SELECTED_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md
- CAPTURE_CHAT_RETURN_TEMPLATE.md
- SETTLE_QUEUE_RESULT_TEMPLATE.md

UI_CONTRACTS:
- extension_agent_cockpit_modes.md
- queue_panel_requirements.md
- selected_request_start_ui.md
- approval_overlay_mode_memory.md

PACKETS:
- B04_EXTENSION_CHAT_SELF_QUEUE_AND_AGENT_COCKPIT_001.md
- B01_SELECTED_REQUEST_START_AND_QUEUE_CLASSIFICATION_001.md

Required protocol rules:
- Queue packets are candidate transitions, not accepted state.
- Agents may edit draft/candidate queue packets only through diff-bearing queue events.
- Approved, claimed, running, proof-accepted, and settled packets are locked except through supersession or cancellation receipts.
- Extension UI must distinguish Start queue head from Start selected request.
- Safe default for branch work is Start selected request only.
- Every start action must show queue_type, request_id, request_path, agent_class, context_binding, authority, and expected proof before execution.
- Queue views must redact secrets and expose only lawful context for the viewing carrier.
- Browser/self-chat queue must support queued prompts to this ChatGPT conversation or branch chats, plus return capture and settlement routing.
- Codex queue items must show worker lifecycle, latest_return.md, task_return.json, proof gate state, WORKLOAD DIFF, touched paths, and receipts.

Required validation:
- JSON schema files parse.
- Any Python touched compiles if code is changed.
- If only docs/schemas are added, run a lightweight JSON validation script or Python json.load over all created JSON files.
- Do not deploy.
- Do not push git.
- Do not read secrets.
- Do not start arbitrary shell beyond targeted validation.
- Do not mutate production state.
- Do not claim the context package accepted; it is candidate until parent settlement.

Required return sections:
- CONTEXT PROOF
- TEMPLATE ACTION PROOF
- VALIDATION
- RESULT
- WORKLOAD DIFF
- BLOCKERS
- RECOMMENDED NEXT PACKET
